name: Droppy
short_description: Self-hosted file manager with upload, download, sharing, and collaboration features.
description: Droppy is a self-hosted file manager for uploading, downloading, organizing, and sharing files. It supports multi-file uploads, folder creation, previews, shareable links, user authentication, and activity logs, offering a clean responsive UI for small groups.
usecases: Share files with generate shareable links.
Upload and organize files through browser.
Simple file hosting for small groups.
